qapreg 0.0.1

    • UNKNOWN TITLE

Extract model-based standard errors

Source: R/qapreg.R
dot-qap_model_se.Rd

Attempts to extract standard errors from a fitted model using stats::vcov(). If extraction fails, returns NA values of the expected length.

Usage

.qap_model_se(fit, coef_names)

Arguments

fit

A fitted model object.

coef_names

Character vector of coefficient names.

Value

A named numeric vector of standard errors.

On this page
